name: Foundation/health
description: Informational hosting checks for /health/check, which is not part of base FHIR. Every assertion is warningOnly because this endpoint is server-specific hosting behavior.

test.name: health/check returns 200 OK
test.description: Informational only: /health/check is not part of base FHIR; this checks that a configured health endpoint returns HTTP 200.

operation.description: Request /health/check, a server-specific endpoint that is not part of base FHIR

assert.description: Informational hosting check: /health/check should return HTTP 200 but is not part of base FHIR

test.name: health/check returns a JSON body (approximates the 'contains description' check)
test.description: Informational only: /health/check is not part of base FHIR. Its server-specific JSON body check is approximated with Content-Type because raw body-text assertions are unsupported.

operation.description: Request /health/check again; this server-specific endpoint is not part of base FHIR

assert.description: Informational hosting check: /health/check should return HTTP 200 but is not part of base FHIR
Informational hosting check: /health/check should return JSON but is not part of base FHIR
